title: Support for 'inside' with parameter arrays
body:
Hello, 

I'd like to request support for using 'inside' with parameter arrays.  Trying the following example

```
module foo
 #(parameter int checklist_p [2:0] = '{0, 1, 2})
 ();

 localparam pass_lp = 1;
 localparam fail_lp = 4;

 initial
   begin
     if (pass_lp inside {checklist_p})
       $display("PASS %d is in checklist_p %p", pass_lp, checklist_p);

     if (fail_lp inside {checklist_p})
       $error("FAIL %d is in checklist_p %p", fail_lp, checklist_p);
   end

 endmodule
```

results in

```
$ verilator --cc foo.v
%Error: foo.v:11: Unsupported: RHS of ==? or !=? must be constant to be synthesizable
%Error: foo.v:14: Unsupported: RHS of ==? or !=? must be constant to be synthesizable
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
%Error: See the manual and http://www.veripool.org/verilator for more assistance.
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin --cc foo.v
```

But the parameter array is constant during elaboration, so I believe this should be synthesizable.  The same example works in synopsys VCS
